text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 26px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #0f172a

g.text: Pauli X、Y、Z：绕对应 Bloch axis 旋转 180°

text.style: font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569

g.text: 先看单 Qubit 的旋转，再看它会翻转哪一种 QEC relationship check

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #0f172a

g.text: 1 · 三种 Pauli error 的几何动作

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #2563eb
font-size: 12.5px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569

g.text: 绕 X 轴：Z 北极 ↔ Z 南极

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569
font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #dc2626
font-size: 12.5px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569

g.text: 绕 Z 轴：+X 端 ↔ −X 端

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569

font-size: 12.5px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569

g.text: 绕 Y 轴：同时改变 X、Z 方向

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 13.5px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #7c3aed

g.text: bit 与 phase 两类关系都变

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #475569

g.text: XX、ZZ 两类 check 都可能报警

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; font-family: 'Noto Sans CJK SC', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #0f172a

g.text: 与该 Qubit 相交的 XX、ZZ check 都翻转

g.text: 旋转轴上的状态留在同一个 Bloch 点；这里关注的是 measurement 结果与 relationship check 是否改变。
